requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Cold-Climate Derating for Estonia PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及爱沙尼亚光伏逆变器低温气候降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及愛沙尼亞光伏逆變器低溫氣候降額

summary.en: For Estonia solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation must be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. EVS is the national standards body (adopting EN/IEC standards as EVS-EN); the Technical Regulatory Authority (TJA) oversees installation compliance; Elering and DSOs control the grid-connection interface. Project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Estonia is a cold-climate northern European market with temperatures regularly below −20 °C in winter and reaching −30 °C in extreme conditions. Unlike coastal island markets where corrosion is the primary environmental concern, in Estonia the safety files should address low-temperature operation, thermal contraction of enclosures, condensation and freeze-thaw cycling on seals and terminals, heating system power requirements, minimum start-up temperature, and cold-climate derating of output power. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory; IEC 62109-1/-2 testing at an EU-recognised accredited laboratory is the standard evidence path.
summary.zh: 对于爱沙尼亚太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件必须围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。EVS是国家标准机构（以EVS-EN标准形式采用EN/IEC标准）；技术监管局（TJA）负责监督安装合规；Elering和DSO控制实际并网接口。项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。爱沙尼亚是北欧低温气候市场，冬季温度定期低于-20°C，极端条件下可达-30°C。与沿海岛屿市场主要关注腐蚀不同，爱沙尼亚的安全文件应重点说明低温运行、外壳热收缩、密封和端子的凝结与冻融循环、加热系统功耗要求、最低启动温度，以及输出功率的低温降额。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU的CE标志为强制要求；在欧盟认可认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2测试是标准证据路径。
summary.zht: 對於愛沙尼亞太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件必須圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。EVS是國家標準機構（以EVS-EN標準形式採用EN/IEC標準）；技術監管局（TJA）負責監督安裝合規；Elering和DSO控制實際並網接口。項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。愛沙尼亞是北歐低溫氣候市場，冬季溫度定期低於-20°C，極端條件下可達-30°C。與沿海島嶼市場主要關注腐蝕不同，愛沙尼亞的安全文件應重點說明低溫運行、外殼熱收縮、密封和端子的凝結與凍融循環、加熱系統功耗要求、最低啟動溫度，以及輸出功率的低溫降額。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU的CE標誌為強制要求；在歐盟認可認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2測試是標準證據路徑。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVD 2014/35/EU — mandatory CE marking for PV inverters on the EU/Estonian market
EVS standards adoption (EN/IEC standards adopted as EVS-EN in Estonia)
TJA (Tehnilise Järelevalve Amet) — Estonian Technical Regulatory Authority installation compliance
Project environmental requirements for cold-climate operation: minimum operating temperature (−30 °C), freeze-thaw, condensation, heating system, and thermal derating documentation

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for EU CE conformity or Estonian project submissions. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Estonian project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions. Chinese standard temperature test ranges may not extend to −30 °C typical of Estonian winter outdoor conditions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为欧盟CE合规或爱沙尼亚项目提交的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而爱沙尼亚项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件。中国标准温度试验范围可能不延伸至爱沙尼亚冬季室外典型的-30°C。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為歐盟CE合規或愛沙尼亞項目提交的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而愛沙尼亞項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件。中國標準溫度試驗範圍可能不延伸至愛沙尼亞冬季室外典型的-30°C。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy EU CE requirements under LVD 2014/35/EU for Estonia. Exporters must provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family from an EU-recognised (ILAC MRA) laboratory, confirm that labels and manuals match the Estonian 230/400 V, 50 Hz configuration, document protection coordination and earthing, and add cold-climate environmental evidence. Estonia-specific safety concerns differ from tropical or coastal-corrosion environments: enclosure IP rating for snow and ice ingress, heating element safety integration, thermal contraction effects on seal integrity, condensation inside enclosures during temperature swings, minimum start-up temperature, and output power derating at low temperatures must all be addressed. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, or surge protection for Estonia require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足爱沙尼亚低电压指令2014/35/EU下的欧盟CE要求。出口商须从欧盟认可（ILAC MRA）实验室取得所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配爱沙尼亚230/400 V、50 Hz配置，记录保护配合和接地，并补充低温气候环境证据。爱沙尼亚特定安全关注点不同于热带或沿海腐蚀环境：须解决外壳对雪和冰进入的IP防护等级、加热元件安全集成、热收缩对密封完整性的影响、温度波动时外壳内冷凝、最低启动温度，以及低温下输出功率降额等问题。针对爱沙尼亚对外壳、端子、固件设置或浪涌保护的任何变更，均需更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足愛沙尼亞低電壓指令2014/35/EU下的歐盟CE要求。出口商須從歐盟認可（ILAC MRA）實驗室取得所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配愛沙尼亞230/400 V、50 Hz配置，記錄保護配合和接地，並補充低溫氣候環境證據。愛沙尼亞特定安全關注點不同於熱帶或沿海腐蝕環境：須解決外殼對雪和冰進入的IP防護等級、加熱元件安全集成、熱收縮對密封完整性的影響、溫度波動時外殼內冷凝、最低啟動溫度，以及低溫下輸出功率降額等問題。針對愛沙尼亞對外殼、端子、韌體設置或浪湧保護的任何變更，均需更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU required for all PV inverters placed on the Estonian market; IEC 62109-1/-2 testing at an EU-recognised laboratory is the standard evidence path. TJA installation oversight is mandatory for permitted installations.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Estonia EU requirements

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Estonian PV projects. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model at an EU-recognised laboratory, align labels and manuals to Estonia's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration (not China 220/380 V), and document cold-climate safety: minimum operating temperature (−30 °C), heating elements, condensation controls, and low-temperature power derating. Confirm current TJA installation and Elering connection requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 爱沙尼亚光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU，CE标志为强制要求。请在欧盟认可实验室为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，使标签和手册匹配爱沙尼亚230/400 V 50 Hz配置（而非中国220/380 V），并记录低温气候安全性：最低运行温度（-30°C）、加热元件、防冷凝控制和低温功率降额。出货前请确认TJA安装要求和Elering并网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 愛沙尼亞光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU，CE標誌為強制要求。請在歐盟認可實驗室為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，使標籤和手冊匹配愛沙尼亞230/400 V 50 Hz配置（而非中國220/380 V），並記錄低溫氣候安全性：最低運行溫度（-30°C）、加熱元件、防冷凝控制和低溫功率降額。出貨前請確認TJA安裝要求和Elering並網要求。
